name: Crystron Citree
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水晶機巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クリストロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－シトリィ
desc: During your opponent's Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 non-Tuner in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated (if any), then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Machine Synchro Monster using only that monster and this card. These Synchro Materials are banished instead of being sent to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Crystron Citree" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your opponent's Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 non-Tuner in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated (if any), then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Machine Synchro Monster using only that monster and this card. These Synchro Materials are banished instead of being sent to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Crystron Citree" once per turn.
eff: During your opponent's Main or Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 non-Tuner in your GY; Special Summon it, but its effects are negated (if any), then immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon 1 Machine Synchro Monster using only that monster and this card. These Synchro Materials are banished instead of being sent to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Crystron Citree" once per turn.

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
Can only use certain Synchro Materials
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
